name: Malt Shoppe Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pint vanilla low-fat frozen yogurt, softened
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the yogurt and whipped topping together until well blended.
2 Reserve half of the crushed candy and mix the remainder into the yogurt mixture.
3 Spoon the mixture into the pie crust.
4 Top with the reserved crushed candy.
5 Freeze for 4 hours.
